## ASSISTANT (2026-07-20 12:46:21)

[{'type': 'text', 'text': "I don't have direct access to token usage statistics for conversations. Token usage information isn't visible to me within the conversation itself.\n\nTo check token usage, you can:\n\n1. **In the Claude Code interface**: Look for token/cost information in the UI (may vary by platform - CLI/desktop/web)\n\n2. **Check logs**: Token usage might be logged in Claude Code's debug output\n\n3. **API Console**: If you're using the Claude API directly, check the [Anthropic Console](https://console.anthropic.com) for usage metrics\n\nIf you'd like me to help you find where token usage is displayed in your specific Claude Code setup, let me know which version you're using (CLI, desktop app, web, or IDE extension).\n\nAre you asking about:\n- This current conversation's token usage?\n- Comparing usage between two different conversation sessions?\n- Something else related to token counting?"}]

I think they want to know how to check token usage for their conversations.\n\nLet me explain how to check token usage in Claude Code.', 'signature': ''}]

---

## ASSISTANT (2026-07-20 12:46:59)

[{'type': 'text', 'text': '要查看对话的 token 使用量，你可以：\n\n1. **查看当前会话统计**：在 Claude Code CLI 中输入命令：\n   ```\n   /stats\n   ```\n   这会显示当前会话的 token 使用情况\n\n2. **查看所有会话**：使用命令：\n   ```\n   /sessions\n   ```\n   可以列出所有会话，可能会显示每个会话的 token 使用情况\n\n3. **如果使用的是 Desktop 或 Web 版本**：\n   - 查看界面右下角或设置区域，通常会显示 token 使用统计\n   - 或者在设置中查找"Usage"或"Statistics"相关选项\n\n你想查看的是：\n- 当前这个对话的 token 使用量？\n- 还是要比较两个不同会话的 token 使用情况？\n\n可以先试试 `/stats` 命令看看能显示什么信息。'}]

---
